_meta.dataset: ТР-1 2026 Табл.6 п.3 — innovative полувагон models that get coefficient 0,9595 to тарифная схема N 8. Independent cross-check of the seed list.
_meta.task: ACQUIRE W5 — verify coefficient + full model list, write to acq-wagon-W5.json

primarySource.what: Приказ ФАС России от 06.11.2025 N 894/25, Приложение N 1, Таблица N 6, пункт 3 (полувагон) — full free text
primarySource.note: sudact.ru is an unofficial mirror but reproduces the full normative text verbatim; consultant.ru LAW_522347 is the same table but gated to commercial access / scheduled free hours.

_meta.verbatim: 3. Полувагон (кроме 6-осных сочлененных вагонов). При перевозках грузов в полувагонах моделей 12-9761-02, 12-9833-01; 12-9853, 12-9869, 12-196-01, 12-196-02, 12-2143, 12-2159 тариф определяется по тарифным схемам, при этом к тарифной схеме N 8 применяется коэффициент 0,9595
_meta.coefMeaning: Multiplier 0,9595 applied to тарифная схема N 8 (own/leased universal wagon, infrastructure+locomotive tariff) when the gondola is one of the listed models. There is NO generic 'innovative coefficient' in ТР-1 2026 — eligibility is tied to the specific model number (25 tс axle load).

DISCREPANCY_WITH_SEED.seedClaim: 9 models including 12-6744 (claimed byte-verified twice against consultant.ru LAW_522347, asserts 12-6744 added as ОВК wagon serial from Feb 2026).
DISCREPANCY_WITH_SEED.finding: The official Табл.6 п.3 text on sudact.ru lists EXACTLY 8 models. 12-6744 is NOT present anywhere on the Table 6 page, nor anywhere in the Приложение-N-1.1 table index. String '6744' returns 0 hits across the full normative text fetched.
DISCREPANCY_WITH_SEED.implication: 12-6744 in the seed is UNSOURCED / likely fitted or carried over from a draft. Only 8 models are officially eligible for the 0,9595 coefficient. This directly affects FITTED LEVER #1: if the ЭФ164189 9 innovative-priced 75т wagons must each resolve to one of these 8 models for the assignment to become SOURCED, 12-6744 must NOT be relied upon.

_meta.method: Located Табл.N 6 via the order TOC (sudact.ru/law/prikaz-fas-rossii-ot-06112025-n-89425/), fetched the table subpage with curl, stripped HTML, extracted the single 0,9595 coefficient row and all 12-* model tokens. Verified exactly one 0,9595 occurrence in the полувагон row and zero occurrences of 6744.

table: ТР-1 2026, Приложение N 1, Таблица N 6, пункт 3 (полувагон)

rejectedModels.reason: NOT present in official Табл.6 п.3 text (приказ ФАС 894/25 / sudact.ru). 0 occurrences of '6744' in the full fetched normative text. Seed file tr1-innovative-models.json wrongly includes it; treat as UNSOURCED.

source: Приказ ФАС России от 06.11.2025 N 894/25, Приложение N 1, Таблица N 6, п.3 — https://sudact.ru/law/prikaz-fas-rossii-ot-06112025-n-89425/prilozhenie-n-1/prilozhenie-n-1_1/tablitsa-n-6/ (cross-ref consultant.ru LAW_522347, gated)
